productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a black, stainless steel circular caseDial style: Black dial with silver toned and white hands, red seconds hand, steel toned hour markings, branding at the 6 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, date aperture at the 3 hour markStrap style: Black textured leather strap with stitch detailing and a tang clasp closureWater resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Maxima Attivo caseWarranty: 1 year
